data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6 ✓ — fix-bug SKILL.md Step 7.5 updated with CLI_user prohibition note. Added: (1) general constraint at top of Step 7.5 under 'When to run' — 'CLI_user tag: Never apply --tags CLI_user to tickets created by this step. Anti-pattern discoveries are autonomous, not user-requested.'; (2) inline note on line 996 after the bug ticket creation instruction — 'Do NOT use --tags CLI_user for these tickets — they are autonomously-discovered defects identified by the anti-pattern scan, not bugs reported by the user during an interactive session.'
